name: Xorbits
description: Chinese OSS team behind Xinference and Xorbits-Datasets/DataFrame parallelism for AI data pipelines.

seo.title: Xorbits — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Xorbits: Chinese OSS team behind Xinference and Xorbits-Datasets/DataFrame parallelism for AI data pipelines.

when_to_use: Parallel DataFrame processing for AI training data at scale
Distributed Xinference LLM serving for ML teams in China
Scaling Python data pipelines across multi-node clusters
Replacing Dask with Xorbits for distributed AI data pipelines
OSS inference server for multiple model frameworks via Xinference

pros: Xinference makes LLM serving genuinely simple
Open source with active Chinese OSS community
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Ray or Dask
Enterprise support path unclear outside China
Breaking changes more frequent than mature tools
review.verdict: Promising OSS for LLM serving and parallel data, but language and ecosystem gaps limit Western adoption.
review.best_for: Chinese ML teams needing local LLM inference and parallel data processing
review.not_for: Production Western teams needing English-first docs and long-term stability guarantees
